objective: Pick up a diamond from the ground.

parsed.objective: Pick up a diamond from the ground.

definite_issues.message: Stick quantity is not batch-valid given the crafting inputs. 4 planks imply two stick crafts (2 planks -> 4 sticks each), producing 8 sticks, but the vertex qty is set to 6.
definite_issues.evidence: Vertex stick has qty=6 while edge any_plank -> stick consumes qty=4 planks (two crafts), which necessarily produces 8 sticks per Minecraft recipe.
definite_issues.suggested_fix: Set the stick vertex qty to 8 to reflect the smallest batch-valid production meeting downstream demand.

parsed.summary: Graph is structurally sound and complete for mining a diamond with an iron pickaxe. One material quantity defect: stick qty should be 8 (not 6) given the 4 planks consumed for stick crafting. Fixing this local batch-valid qty resolves the issue.
